channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: TuneCore Partners With EarthPercent & Sounds Right to ‘Weave Planetary Care Into the Fabric’ of New Releases
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Happy Earth Day, everyone. Today, we're celebrating our amazing planet and the ecosystems that sustain us. And, in honor of this special day, we've got some exciting news to share with you. TuneCore, a leading platform for independent artists, has just announced a new partnership with Brian Eno's EarthPercent organization and its Sounds Right Initiative.
[Music transitions to a gentle, natural soundscape]
Host: "This innovative partnership allows TuneCore artists to directly support ecosystem restoration by donating a portion of their streaming revenue to Indigenous and community-led nature conservation efforts. It's simple: artists just need to add 'Nature' as a collaborator on their release, and a percentage of their royalties will automatically be donated to the Sounds Right Fund.
[Brief sound clip of Brian Eno speaking]
Host: "As Brian Eno says, 'Music has always been a powerful force for change... With EarthPercent, our aim is to give artists a simple, direct way to contribute to the health of the planet we all share.' And, to kickstart this partnership, TuneCore has pledged £10,000, which will be doubled to £20,000 as part of EarthPercent's 'Big Give' campaign.
[Music transitions back to the intro tune]
Host: "This partnership is built on the success of the Sounds Right initiative, which has already raised over $400,000 for conservation projects in the Amazon and Congo Basin regions. So, let's celebrate this amazing collaboration and the power of music to make a positive impact on our planet. Thanks for tuning in, and happy Earth Day!"
[Outro music plays]
